Spanglish (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $42,044,321Details
International Box Office $12,300,000
Worldwide Box Office $54,344,321
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,817,853 (21.0% of total gross)
Legs:4.77 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:77.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$75,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,438 opening theaters/2,587 max. theaters, 4.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $80,040,172

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 17th, 2004 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: February 18th, 2005 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: April 5th, 2005 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some sexual content and brief language
Running Time: 133 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Prologue, Voiceover/Narration
Plot point: Addiction, Dysfunctional Family, Immigration, Non-Chronological, Single Parent, Undocumented Worker
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Target audience: Hispanic
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Columbia Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English, Spanish
